records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when a Bolivian public authority or recognised racing operator publishes a stable current meeting calendar.
records.blocked_reason: The reviewed public planning document mentions a local horse race but does not establish a current recurring calendar, authority-wide coverage, or a stable meeting source.
limitations: The evidence is local and planning-oriented rather than a current racing calendar.
No current date and venue pairing is approved.
The source must not be generalised to national Bolivian racing activity.
records.notes: Keep Bolivia out of current-calendar output until a current official meeting source is reviewed.
